metadata.description: MoE-aware coding skill and code-assistant instructions that stabilize expert routing for Mixture-of-Experts models (Qwen, GLM, DeepSeek, Mixtral, local MoE)

plugins.name: moe-execution
plugins.description: Stabilizes MoE expert routing via role anchors, consistent vocabulary, single-domain turns, and structured prompts, then enforces impact-mapping and per-change verification. For any Mixture-of-Experts model (Qwen, GLM, DeepSeek, Mixtral, local MoE).
